title: meliosma beaniana
intro: Meliosma beaniana, also known as the Tengammeng, is a plant species native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Meliosma beaniana include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Meliosma beaniana is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for its medicinal uses, and it can also be found in various herbal supplements and traditional remedies.
